mapper.select: /** 팝업게시판 토탈카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_popup WHERE 1=1
/** 통합게시판 상세 조회 */ SELECT * FROM t_popup WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(IDX),0)+1 IDX FROM t_popup
/** 팝업 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_popup (IDX,TITLE,CONTENT,IMG,STATUS,START_DTIME,END_DTIME,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_DTIME ,HEIGHT,WIDTH,POS_X,POS_Y) VALUES (#{idx},#{title},#{content},#{img},#{status},#{startDtime},#{endDtime},#{regId},#{regNm},#{regDtime} ,#{height},#{width},#{posX},#{posY})
